user.name: Kirk Borne
user.description: Advisor to startups. Freelancer. @LeadershipData founder. Global Speaker. Top B2B influencer & social promoter of Data Science AI ML. PhD Astrophysics @Caltech

fullText:
💥Scikit-learn Cookbook — 80+ recipes for Machine Learning in Python with scikit-learn [3rd Edition]: https://t.co/Z32D8jOzxC v/ @PacktDataML

𝓒𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓮𝓷𝓽𝓼:
🔹Common Conventions & API Elements of Scikit-Learn
🔹Pre-Model Workflow and Data Preprocessing
🔹Dimensionality Reduction Techniques
🔹Build Models with Distance Metrics & Nearest Neighbors
🔹Linear Models and Regularization
🔹Advanced Logistic Regression and Extensions
🔹Support Vector Machines and Kernel Methods
🔹Tree-Based Algorithms and Ensemble Methods
🔹Text Processing and Multiclass Classification
🔹Clustering Techniques
🔹Novelty and Outlier Detection
🔹Cross-Validation and Model Evaluation Techniques
🔹Deploying Scikit-Learn Models in Production

My Review (on Amazon):
I love this book, not only for its amazing content, but also for its brilliant adherence to its "Cookbook" label. The table of contents looks repetitive, but that's the magic of it. Find the algorithm, method, or application that you want "to cook up," and the presentation follows a uniform format from chapter to chapter. This is an extraordinarily practical, useful, and reader-friendly style, perfect for the target audience: anyone who needs to use (or is discovering how to use) specific Scikit-learn tools for their Python-based machine learning tasks. Consequently, this is great not only for individual use but also for training workshops and other educational settings. Python code in a cookbook context has never looked so good. IMHO.

user.name: AIGCLINK
user.description: 致力于让每个想拥抱AI的人都能找到适合自己的AI产品，助力企业定制AIGC应用

fullText:
这些天很火的AI剪辑师来了：ChatCut替代剪辑里最机械的那几步——导素材、拉时间线、配音乐、转写加字幕、导出——现在能一句话交给 agent 去做了。

也可以在codex里安装ChatCut-Inc/agent-plugin插件， 把视频剪辑器 ChatCut 就可以连到了 Codex：用自然语言描述需求，agent 就能替你导入媒体、改时间线、做动态图形、生成素材、转写音频、加字幕、导出，甚至回头验证这些改动在编辑器里真的生效了。

ChatCut 把自己的编辑能力暴露成一个托管 MCP server（https://t.co/GcPV2O7J7S），插件本体就是一个 Codex 插件：plugin.json（让 Codex 认得它）+ .mcp.json（连那个托管端点）+ 一组 skills/（把常见剪辑任务封装成工作流，让 agent 不必每次从零推理"这刀怎么剪"）。认证走 Codex 自己的登录流，插件不碰你的密钥。

ChatCut的商业模式也值得学习，它本身是个saas服务，把自己的能力变成 agent 可调用的接口，把整个产品的能力通过插件，标准化地开放给外部 agent 来操作。

使用的时候，示例 prompt很直白，对于剪辑的人来说解放双手："动嘴不动手"，对我这种懒人来说确实解决了问题，比如：

"把这段视频导进我的 ChatCut 项目"
"加一个简单的动态图形叠层"
"生成一段配音和背景音乐"
"转写这段并加上字幕"
"导出当前项目"

剪辑器的交互，正在从"你用鼠标在时间线上拖"变成"你用一句话让 agent 去拖"——ChatCut 把这条路，直接铺成了一个官方 MCP 插件。

#ChatCut #AI剪辑 #MCP #Codex #AI视频

fullText:
TRANSFER LEARNING book [390 pages]: https://t.co/mXv4YBGUjU

Amazon Summary:
"Transfer learning deals with how systems can quickly adapt themselves to new situations, tasks and environments. It gives machine learning systems the ability to leverage auxiliary data and models to help solve target problems when there is only a small amount of data available. This makes such systems more reliable and robust, keeping the machine learning model faced with unforeseeable changes from deviating too much from expected performance. At an enterprise level, transfer learning allows knowledge to be reused so experience gained once can be repeatedly applied to the real world."

user.name: elvis
user.description: Building self-improving AI @dair_ai • Prev: Meta AI | PhD • Learn about AI Agents for FREE here: https://t.co/P5SA9u54xO

fullText:
Another big reason to use combination of frontier models.

Chain-of-thought monitoring is treated as a reliable safety layer for agents. This DeepMind-affiliated study shows the layer can be argued out of doing its job.

Giving the monitor access to the agent reasoning trace raised approval of harmful actions by 9.5 percent on average, because the scratchpad becomes an extra channel for persuasion.

The fix was model diversity.

Pairing a Claude 3.7 Sonnet monitor with a GPT-4.1 fact-checker from a different family cut policy-violating approvals by up to 45 percent, versus only 6 percent when one model played both roles.

If your oversight rests on one model reading another model reasoning, an adversarial agent can talk its way past it. Cross-family fact-checking is the cheaper robustness lever here.

Paper: https://t.co/6qfuAEXqG6

Learn to build effective AI agents in our academy: https://t.co/1e8RZKs4uX

Screenshots of chatbots since 2022.
Formerly: Google DeepMind, Scale.

fullText:
GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5 try to read “handwriting,” but it’s actually just meaningless scribbles I drew on my phone with my eyes closed.

Sol seems to reliably hallucinate an answer. Fable admits it can’t read it, or even pushes back and says it’s not actually writing. https://t.co/OzrDGdAczg
